scripts.node:version: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && node -v && npm -v'
scripts.start: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start "$@"' --
scripts.device: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start --host lan "$@"' --
scripts.device:tunnel: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start --tunnel "$@"' --
scripts.dev-client: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start --dev-client "$@"' --
scripts.build:android:dev: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile development "$@"' --
scripts.android: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start --android "$@"' --
scripts.ios: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start --ios "$@"' --
scripts.web: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo start --web "$@"' --
scripts.export:web: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && expo export --platform web --output-dir /tmp/english-study-web-export'
scripts.typecheck: bash -lc 'unset npm_config_prefix NO_COLOR && source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent && export PATH="$NVM_BIN:$PATH" && tsc --noEmit'
scripts.backend:install: python3 -m venv backend/.venv && backend/.venv/bin/pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
